interface.longDescription:
Busbud brings bus and train travel into your ChatGPT conversations.
With the Busbud ChatGPT app, you can search bus and train routes, compare options in a single conversation and jump straight to purchasing your ticket on Busbud.

What you can do with Busbud on ChatGPT:
Query bus and train inventory across thousands of operators worldwide.
Get up-to-date prices, schedules, and availability.
View the cheapest and fastest trips.
See operator name, price, duration, and departure details.
defaultPrompt: Show me buses from Philadelphia to New York City
